name: reteno
description: Reteno email editing and web funnel analysis for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Reteno email editing and funnel analysis
interface.longDescription: Bundle reusable Reteno workflows for editing existing email templates through MCP and analyzing onboarding funnels with Playwright.
defaultPrompt: Use Reteno to read or update an existing Reteno email message by ID.
Use Reteno to analyze an onboarding funnel URL and produce a step-by-step summary.
